_about: Settings for install.py. Run it on the box with DB access. Any value here can be overridden with a CLI flag (--base-id, --price, --currency, --host/--user/--password/--database).
_base_id: Per pack: a NUMBER creates items at exactly that id range (manual). Or "auto" lets the installer find a free block for you. EITHER WAY it never overwrites items it didn't create -- if a manual range is occupied it ABORTS and tells you, it does not clobber.
_icon: Optional per pack: a default inventory icon id for items that lack one. The illusion/familiar/pet-illusion packs already reuse each spell's real item icon where the game has one; set this to cover the rest. 0 = leave the pack default.
_categories: Optional per pack: rename a category if its name clashes with one you already have, e.g. "categories": { "Illusions": "Player Illusions" }. The installer ABORTS rather than merge into a category that isn't ours.
